meaning: adj.[数][物]模的,有标准组件的
examples: They ended up buying a modular home on a two-acre lot.
Around the world, prefabricated and modular buildings are gaining in popularity.
But modular and prefabricated buildings elsewhere are, for the most part, low-rise.
This modular approach will in large part determine whether VW can pass Toyota or GM.
But these advantages do not add up to a conclusive case for a small modular future.
